name: codesucker
description: 软著代码抽取器 —— 离线生成符合软件著作权申报规范的源程序文档

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codesucker/core && npm run build -w @codesucker/app
scripts.test: npm run test -w @codesucker/core && npm run test -w @codesucker/app
scripts.perf: npm run build && npm run perf -w @codesucker/app
scripts.verify: npm run version:check && npm run lockfile:check && npm test && npm run build && npm run test:integration
